positions.detail: Up 106% — at or above 15% day-4 target. Consider taking profit.
Down -66% — stop loss triggered at -50%. Close position.
Up 131% — at or above 15% day-4 target. Consider taking profit.

agent_analysis:
## POSITION MONITOR — Thursday (ELEVATED)

---

### FTNT CALL: +106% ✅ TARGET HIT
Stock +3.1% confirms momentum thesis. At 7x the day-4 target of 15%. Charm is irrelevant — this option is deep ITM with high delta. **No reason to hold into Friday's theta cliff.** Take profit NOW.

### AAPL CALL: +131% ✅ TARGET HIT
Stock +1.8% driving outsized option return — gamma worked in our favor. Same logic: 8.7x the Thursday target. Holding overnight risks giving back 20-40% of gains to theta alone (~4%/day baseline, accelerating into expiry). **Take profit NOW.**

### LULU PUT: -66% 🛑 STOP BLOWN
Past the -50% hard stop. Should have been closed already. Stock moved +2.3% against the put thesis — direction was wrong. At -66% on Thursday with 1 day left, recovery requires a ~4% reversal tomorrow. Not happening without a catalyst. **Close immediately at market.**

---

## RECOMMENDATION

**Close all three positions today. No holds into Friday.**

Two winners at +106% and +131% are exceptional for a weekly hold — locking in profits eliminates overnight risk, gap risk, and Friday's liquidity cliff after 3 PM. LULU is a dead position bleeding past stop; every hour held is additional loss to theta.

**Priority order:** LULU first (stop discipline), then FTNT and AAPL (profit locks). Market orders acceptable on all three given ELEVATED urgency.

Net week: two strong wins easily offset the LULU loss. Portfolio-level outcome is solidly positive. Execute now.
